title: Swollsy's Tools and Swords
description:
My take on the tools and swords!

Made each tool and sword type different so there is more variation.
body: # **Swollsy's Tools and Swords** My take on the tools and swords! Made each tool and sword type different so there is more variation. 1.20 - 1.21 Updated: ![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dad378e554958d8900002f1923adb483b3d3a2b0.png)
